title: ZXBrick Guides
description: Official ZXBrick guides covering gameplay, controls, levels, power-ups, achievements, leaderboards, and everything you need to master the game.

pages.title: Overview
pages.description: Discover ZXBrick and learn what makes this retro-inspired brick-breaking game part of the ZX Series.

pages.title: How to Play
pages.description: Learn the basics of ZXBrick, from clearing your first level to mastering the core gameplay.

pages.title: Controls
pages.description: Master paddle movement, improve your reactions, and keep the ball in play.

pages.title: Game Progression
pages.description: Discover how ZXBrick's level progression keeps every game fresh and rewarding.

pages.title: BarkinMad Coins
pages.description: Earn BarkinMad Coins through gameplay and unlock cosmetic rewards across the ZX Series.

pages.title: Achievements
pages.description: Unlock achievements as you play and complete new gameplay milestones.

pages.title: Leaderboards
pages.description: Compete for the highest score and compare your performance with players around the world.

pages.title: Tips & Strategy
pages.description: Improve your skills with practical advice for completing levels and chasing higher scores.

pages.title: Frequently Asked Questions
pages.description: Find answers to the questions players ask most about ZXBrick.

pages.title: Levels
pages.description: Explore all 100 handcrafted levels and discover how the challenge grows as you progress.

pages.title: Power-Ups
pages.description: Learn how power-ups work and when to use them to gain the greatest advantage.

pages.title: Complete Guide
pages.description: Everything you need to know about ZXBrick in one complete guide.

pages.title: Screenshots
pages.description: Take a visual tour of ZXBrick and explore its gameplay, progression, and features.
